candidates.name: Mike Kehoe
candidates.notes: 58th Governor of Missouri (inaugurated Jan 13, 2025). Succeeded Mike Parson. First Catholic Republican governor of MO. Second Catholic governor overall. Named 'Leo' after a pope — mother was daily communicant (6am mass every morning). X bio: 'Christian. Husband. Father. First-Generation Farmer. Small Businessman.' Eliminated DEI initiatives in MO state agencies. Expanded MOScholars program ($50M for private/parochial school scholarships). Signed law allowing landlord discrimination against voucher tenants (Jul 2025). First 100 days focused on public safety, workforce, economic growth, agriculture. NRA lifetime member ('decades'). Strong 2A defender. Former Lt. Governor under Parson. Ford car dealership owner.

profile.background: Businessman; Missouri state senator; Lieutenant Governor; became 58th governor in January 2025.

candidates.name: Josh Hawley
candidates.notes: Senior Senator from MO. Heritage Action LIFETIME 91% — 83% (116th), 94% (117th), 96% (118th). One of Senate's most vocal Christian nationalists. At National Conservatism Conference (Jul 8, 2024): 'Christian nationalism founded American democracy' and called it 'the best form of democracy yet devised.' Raised fist to Jan 6 crowd outside Capitol (iconic photo). Youngest senator when elected (38). Former MO Attorney General. Yale Law graduate. Clerked for Chief Justice John Roberts. Evangelical Presbyterian (The Crossing Church, Columbia MO). Authored book on masculinity crisis. Anti-Big Tech crusader. Wants to overturn Johnson Amendment (ban on partisan politics from pulpit). NRA 93% (2018), 86% (2016). Strong pro-life, anti-immigration, America First positions. Press account: @SenHawleyPress.

profile.education: Stanford University (BA History), Yale Law School (JD)
profile.background: Former Missouri Attorney General and constitutional law professor. Clerked for Chief Justice John Roberts. Author and advocate for Big Tech regulation. Youngest sitting senator when elected in 2018.

candidates.name: Eric Schmitt
candidates.notes: Junior Senator from MO since 2023. Heritage Action 96% (119th current), 92% (118th). Former MO Attorney General (2019-2023) and MO State Treasurer (2017-2019). Catholic. As AG: filed and WON lawsuits defending religious institutions' right to remain open during COVID lockdowns. Led brief in NYSRPA v. Bruen (landmark 2A SCOTUS case). Issued cease-and-desist to Biden's FBI over MO concealed carry permit audits. NRA A+ rating (2022 campaign). Filed bill to make Easter Monday a federal holiday (Apr 2025). Speaker at 2025 National Conservatism Conference. Endorsed by Gun Owners of America and National Association for Gun Rights. 'America First' campaign platform: 'Fight Tyranny. Crush Socialism. Save America.' Son Stephen has rare genetic condition — motivated healthcare advocacy.

profile.education: Truman State University (BA Political Science), Saint Louis University School of Law (JD)
profile.background: Former Missouri Attorney General and State Treasurer. Former Missouri State Senator and Glendale alderman. Sixth-generation Missourian. In Senate since 2023.

district_offices.address: 111 South 10th Street, Suite 23.305, Thomas F. Eagleton US Courthouse
